name: REBEL Dartz

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C38CFA89-9921-49AA-AD1B-A4A8DE31E8F3

comment: The REBEL DARTZ channels the unapologetic REBEL spirit into a compact, high-impact beam FX mover built for designers who demand speed, precision, and reliability in any environment. Its fierce 150W RBL engine drives an ultra-narrow 1.5° beam—sharp enough to carve the air and powerful enough to cut through dense atmospherics with ease.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast

gwSpecs.description: The REBEL DARTZ channels the unapologetic REBEL spirit into a compact, high-impact beam FX mover built for designers who demand speed, precision, and reliability in any environment. Its fierce 150W RBL engine drives an ultra-narrow 1.5° beam—sharp enough to carve the air and powerful enough to cut through dense atmospherics with ease.
